name: AZURE_CLIENT_ID
notes: GitHub OIDC client id for jobs release and deploy workflows.

name: AZURE_TENANT_ID
notes: Azure tenant id discovered from az account show when available.

name: AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID
notes: Azure subscription id discovered from az account show when available.

name: RESOURCE_GROUP
notes: Shared runtime resource group owned by control-plane provisioning.

name: ACR_NAME
notes: Shared Azure Container Registry name.

name: ACR_PULL_IDENTITY_NAME
notes: User-assigned identity used by jobs to pull from ACR.

name: CONTAINER_APPS_ENVIRONMENT_NAME
notes: Shared Container Apps environment name.

name: SERVICE_ACCOUNT_NAME
notes: Shared workload identity or service account name.

name: AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME
notes: Primary storage account for runtime data.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_COMMON
notes: Canonical common container name.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_BRONZE
notes: Canonical bronze container name.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_SILVER
notes: Canonical silver container name.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_GOLD
notes: Canonical gold container name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_MARKET
notes: Canonical market folder name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_FINANCE
notes: Canonical finance folder name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_EARNINGS
notes: Canonical earnings folder name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_TARGETS
notes: Canonical price-target folder name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_ECONOMIC_CATALYST
notes: Canonical economic catalyst folder name.

name: CONTRACTS_REPOSITORY
notes: Sibling contracts repo slug used by workflows.

name: CONTRACTS_REF
notes: Contracts ref to validate against by default.

name: CONTROL_PLANE_REPOSITORY
notes: Sibling control-plane repo slug used by repository_dispatch.

name: DEBUG_SYMBOLS
notes: Optional debug symbols for jobs workflows.

name: BACKFILL_START_DATE
notes: Default backfill start date.

name: BRONZE_MARKET_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for bronze market sync.

name: BRONZE_FINANCE_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for bronze finance sync.

name: BRONZE_PRICE_TARGET_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for bronze price-target sync.

name: BRONZE_EARNINGS_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for bronze earnings sync.

name: BRONZE_ECONOMIC_CATALYST_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for bronze economic catalyst sync.

name: SILVER_MARKET_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for silver market sync.

name: SILVER_FINANCE_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for silver finance sync.

name: SILVER_PRICE_TARGET_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for silver price-target sync.

name: SILVER_EARNINGS_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for silver earnings sync.

name: SILVER_ECONOMIC_CATALYST_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for silver economic catalyst sync.

name: GOLD_MARKET_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for gold market sync.

name: GOLD_FINANCE_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for gold finance sync.

name: GOLD_PRICE_TARGET_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for gold price-target sync.

name: GOLD_EARNINGS_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for gold earnings sync.

name: GOLD_REGIME_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for regime recompute.

name: GOLD_ECONOMIC_CATALYST_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for gold economic catalyst sync.

name: PLATINUM_RANKINGS_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for platinum rankings.

name: BACKTEST_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for backtests.

name: JOB_STARTUP_API_CONTAINER_APPS
notes: Container Apps that jobs may wake before running. Default this to the internal control-plane app name.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_EARNINGS_FRESH_DAYS
notes: Alpha Vantage earnings freshness window.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_FINANCE_FRESH_DAYS
notes: Alpha Vantage finance freshness window.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_MAX_WORKERS
notes: Alpha Vantage worker concurrency.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Alpha Vantage timeout.

name: MASSIVE_FINANCE_FRESH_DAYS
notes: Massive finance freshness window.

name: MASSIVE_MAX_WORKERS
notes: Massive worker concurrency.

name: MASSIVE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Massive timeout.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_OFFICIAL_SOURCES
notes: Comma-separated official-source fetchers for the economic catalyst bronze job.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_VENDOR_SOURCES
notes: Comma-separated vendor-source fetchers for the economic catalyst bronze job.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_COUNTRY_SCOPE
notes: Comma-separated country or region codes to keep in economic catalyst outputs.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_HIGH_IMPACT_GROUPS
notes: Comma-separated canonical event groups treated as high-impact.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_STRUCTURED_CORRECTION_LOOKBACK_DAYS
notes: Rolling structured-event replay window for economic catalyst ingestion.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_HEADLINE_CORRECTION_LOOKBACK_DAYS
notes: Rolling headline replay window for economic catalyst ingestion.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_FUTURE_SCHEDULE_DAYS
notes: Forward schedule horizon in days for economic catalyst event pulls.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_GENERAL_POLL_MINUTES
notes: General full-source polling cadence in minutes for the bronze economic catalyst job.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_HOT_WINDOW_POLL_MINUTES
notes: Hot-window polling cadence in minutes for headline and structured catalyst refreshes.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_ALPHA_VANTAGE_TOPICS
notes: Alpha Vantage news topics used by the economic catalyst bronze job.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_FOMC_SCHEDULE_URLS
notes: Comma-separated Federal Reserve schedule URLs used for FOMC calendar scraping.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_BLS_ICS_URL
notes: BLS release calendar ICS URL.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_BEA_SCHEDULE_URL
notes: BEA release schedule URL.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_ECB_CALENDAR_URL
notes: ECB policy calendar URL.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_BOE_CALENDAR_URL
notes: Bank of England MPC calendar URL.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_BOJ_SCHEDULE_URL
notes: Bank of Japan release schedule URL.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_TREASURY_AUCTIONS_URL
notes: Treasury auction calendar URL.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_NASDAQ_TABLES
notes: JSON table mapping configuration for Nasdaq economic event tables.

name: ECONOMIC_CATALYST_HTTP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: HTTP timeout for economic catalyst source fetches.

name: ASSET_ALLOCATION_API_BASE_URL
notes: Control-plane base URL used by jobs HTTP clients. Default to the internal ACA service URL http://asset-allocation-api-vnet; do not use a public ACA ingress FQDN in prod.

name: ASSET_ALLOCATION_API_SCOPE
notes: Managed-identity scope used for jobs to control-plane auth. Auto-discovered from the asset-allocation-api Entra app when available.

name: AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING
notes: Storage connection string. Never auto-discovered.

name: FRED_API_KEY
notes: FRED API key for release calendar ingestion. Never auto-discovered.

name: BEA_API_KEY
notes: BEA API key for supplemental release metadata. Never auto-discovered.

name: NASDAQ_API_KEY
notes: Nasdaq API key. Never auto-discovered.

name: MASSIVE_API_KEY
notes: Massive API key for Benzinga news ingestion. Never auto-discovered.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY
notes: Alpha Vantage API key for news and economic backfill. Never auto-discovered.

name: ALPACA_KEY_ID
notes: Alpaca key id for news reconciliation. Never auto-discovered.

name: ALPACA_SECRET_KEY
notes: Alpaca secret key for news reconciliation. Never auto-discovered.

name: POSTGRES_DSN
notes: Jobs Postgres connection string. Never auto-discovered.

name: PYTHON_PACKAGE_INDEX_URL
notes: Optional primary Python package index for CI and release workflows.

name: PYTHON_PACKAGE_EXTRA_INDEX_URL
notes: Optional extra Python package index for CI and release workflows.
